originalTitle: S&P 500, Nasdaq Futures Slip Amid Renewed US-Iran Tensions, Chipmaker Losses: AVGO, KEEL, CRWD, MSTR Stocks In Focus
summary: U.S. President Donald Trump has said that he would consider ending the ceasefire with Iran if any American troops are killed in the renewed tensions with Iran, according to the Wall Street Journal.
